summary: Iteration 16: Comprehensive E2E Pre-deployment Test - ALL 21 backend API tests passed (100%), ALL frontend UI tests passed. Backend APIs call real Conway API and real Telegram API (no mocks). Telegram bot @AnimaFundbot confirmed alive and sending messages. SSE stream delivering events correctly. Credits funding QR code flow works end-to-end. Provisioning stepper properly gated by credit balance.
critical_code_review_comments: All 21 backend endpoints return correct response structures
Real Conway API integration confirmed - balance returns 0 credits (expected for test key)
Real Telegram integration confirmed - test message successfully sent to chat
SSE /api/live/stream endpoint returns proper event-stream format
Conway services health check returns all_healthy=true (cloud, domains, inference)
Credits purchase returns x402 payment protocol with QR code, pay_to address, USDC amount
Skills endpoint returns 100+ skills from 4+ sources (anima, conway-cloud, openclaw, clawhub)
genesis-prompt.md contains Phase 1 ($5k in hours), Phase 2 ($10k threshold), Phase 3 (VC fund + incubator)
50% creator split clearly documented in genesis-prompt.md
Frontend correctly shows $0.00 balance with appropriate disabled states
All 6 provisioning steps present and properly gated by credit balance
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 is a comprehensive pre-deployment E2E test. All backend endpoints verified with real API calls (not mocked). Conway API key has 0 credits which is expected for testing. Telegram bot @AnimaFundbot is live. Frontend shows genesis/onboarding screen with credits funding panel, QR code payment flow, and 6-step provisioning stepper. All features working correctly.

GET /api/skills/available - 200 OK (100+ skills from anima, conway-cloud, openclaw, clawhub)
